name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the lime gelatin in hot water.
2. Allow the mixture to cool.
3. Add cucumber and onion to the gelatin.
4. Gently fold in sour cream, cottage cheese, and mayonnaise until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a 6-cup mold.
6. Refrigerate for at least four hours before serving.
